title: Policy: Remove some settings from Policy - Settings Unlocked
scenario: Policy-removed settings become unlocked and editable in the app after Cloud policy changes are applied
steps: 1. On the Cloud, remove one or more settings from the Policy and apply the changes.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the device.
3. Navigate to the settings that were previously locked by the Policy (e.g., Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → [Feature]).
4. Verify that the previously locked settings are now unlocked and editable.
5. Tap on any previously policy-affected setting.
expected: The previously policy-locked settings in the Poly Studio Mobile app become unlocked and editable. Tapping on any such setting allows the user to change its value.
